findings.title: rh-aiservices-bu/guidellm-pipeline
findings.description: GuideLLM Pipeline for Benchmark and Evaluate LLMs

findings.title: Syx1030/CARE-Bench
findings.description: [AAAI-26 AISI] CARE-Bench: A Benchmark of Diverse Client Simulations Guided by Expert Principles for Evaluating LLMs in Psychological Counseling

findings.title: danieleschmidt/embodied-ai-benchmark
findings.description: Extends Habitat and ManiSkill with multi-agent tasks including cooperative furniture assembly and LLM-guided curriculum learning. Following the "future directions" blueprint from the 2025 survey, this benchmark pushes the boundaries of embodied AI evaluation.

findings.title: olekkut/coding-llm-benchmarks-guide
findings.description: This repository provides an extensive, in-depth comparison and benchmarking of state-of-the-art local coding Large Language Models (LLMs), evaluating their performance, accuracy, inference speed, memory requirements, supported programming languages, licensing, and practical suitability for various use cases.

findings.title: VhoCheng/MedScope
findings.description: MedScope: A lightweight benchmark for evaluating open-source large language models (LLMs) on medical question answering. It quantifies performance, efficiency, and robustness of 1B-4B parameter LLMs (LLaMA, Qwen, Gemma) to guide safe, responsible deployment in resource-constrained healthcare settings.

findings.title: Bharat-Nandakumar/LLM-Guided-Optimization-for-the-Travelling-Tournament-Problem
findings.description: LLM-guided heuristic optimization framework for the Travelling Tournament Problem (TTP) with constraint-aware move selection and benchmark evaluation.

findings.title: advik-holalu/lms-llm-evaluation
findings.description: Designed a full-stack Learning Management System using Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS with Google Gemini API to generate study plans, summaries, and flashcards. Conducted benchmarking of GPT-4o, Gemini, and DeepSeek for coherence, factual accuracy, and latency to guide model integration.

findings.title: phani-x507/-Offline-LLMs-for-Low-Spec-Devices--A-Study-on-Efficiency-and-Usability-
findings.description: This project benchmarks offline Masked and Causal Language Models (MLMs, CLMs) like DistilBERT, MobileBERT, TinyLLaMA, Phi-2, and Gemma-2B. It evaluates accuracy, efficiency, and text quality using BLEU, ROUGE, and Perplexity, ensuring privacy-focused AI applications. The results guide optimal offline LLM selection.

findings.title: annon305/MMLogQA
findings.description: A multimodal log-based technical QA framework with two expert-validated datasets (CTQA & DTQA), comprehensive baselines (LLMs/VLMs + OCR), and Explanation-Guided DPO (EG-DPO) for reliable reasoning and abstention on unanswerable queries. Includes evaluation scripts and benchmarks for cloud- and device-centric log reasoning.

findings.title: Open-Sourcery-UMD/Impact-of-Agent-Personality-on-Multi-Agent-System-Performance
findings.description: Explores how agent personalities (detailed, succinct, critical) affect performance in MetaGPT’s fixed-role multi-agent system. Evaluates correctness, speed, and collaboration on coding benchmarks. Includes prompt templates, decoding setups, and reproducible experiments to guide LLM team design.
